section.title: Open-Ended Feedback
section.description: Finally, please provide brief written responses to the questions below. Your insights will help us understand context, suggestions, or concerns in your own words.

questions.hint: In your experience, what challenges, risks, or negative impacts (if any) have you observed when using AI in project management? Examples: issues of accuracy, trust, ethical concerns, job impact, integration difficulties, data privacy, over-reliance, etc.

Which specific project management tasks have you stopped or significantly reduced doing manually because of AI? Examples: status report writing, data aggregation, meeting summaries, risk assessment, schedule updates, etc.

Do you have any suggestions or ideas for how AI tools could better support project management in the future? For instance: features you wish existed, improvements to current tools, or specific needs in project management that AI hasn't met yet.

If you could design the ideal AI assistant for your role, which 3 project management activities would you want it to own end-to-end? Think about activities where AI could completely handle the task from start to finish with minimal human intervention.

If your primary role is NOT 'Project Manager' (e.g., Developer, Architect, Tech Lead), how has AI changed the project management portion of your responsibilities? Skip this question if you are a full-time Project Manager.
questions.guidance: Optional. Please write 2-5 sentences if applicable.
